subject.verb: Property/action belongs on an existing entity; refactor to natural OOP
state-machine: Process/action should be a first-class object; e.g. Process.run(), Action.do(), Application.start()
truncate: Symbol can be shortened without collision — agents MUST evaluate the defining scope, not guess from the name
prefix-grouping: Multiple prefix* locals → const prefix = { a, b, c }
suffix-grouping: Multiple *suffix locals → const suffix = { a, b }
kv-ify: Host/port or similar pairs → { host, port }
snakify: camelCase field should be snake_case to match convention
serde: Serialized/constant field; evaluate for naming uniformity across the project
external: Defined by a dependency; do not rename
